content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 7, 0), (4, 7, 0), (3, 8, 3), (7, 8, 9), (1, 7, 11), (0, 4, 12), (0, 8, 13), (5, 6, 13), (2, 5, 15), (6, 7, 16), (0, 1, 17), (4, 8, 19), (7, 9, 20), (2, 8, 21), (1, 2, 23), (4, 9, 23), (2, 9, 25), (5, 8, 25)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 13.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 13:

* Edge (3, 7, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 7, 0) has node 4 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 8, 3) has node 3 and time 3. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 8, 9) has node 7 and time 9. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 7, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 4, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 8, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 6, 13) has node 5 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 5, 15) has node 2 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 16) has node 6 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 8, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 20) has node 7 and time 20. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 8, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 23) has node 1 and time 23. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 9, 23) has node 4 and time 23. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 9, 25) has node 2 and time 25. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 8, 25) has node 5 and time 25. -> Add node 8.

The nodes matched are 8 and 9.

Answer: [8, 9]
